name: Quick Test
description: Simple test to verify the eval runner works with scoring

test_cases.name: Exact Technical Answer
test_cases.system_prompt: Answer directly and concisely. Do not explain your reasoning.
test_cases.prompt: What exact JSON value should represent a judge provider failure instead of false agreement?

test_cases.name: Tool Selection
test_cases.system_prompt:
You have these tools:
- read_file(path): Read a repository file
- search_docs(query): Search project documentation
- run_tests(command): Run a validation command

Respond with: TOOL: tool_name(args)
Do not explain, just output the tool call.
test_cases.prompt: Open the evaluator implementation to inspect tool-call scoring.

test_cases.name: Technical Contains Check
test_cases.prompt: Name two confusion-matrix error types for evaluator validation.
